title: Human Resource Recruitment Officer
summary: The Human Resources Recruitment Officer responsible for managing all aspects of staff recruitment. S/he oversees the process to ensure procedures are followed in a fair and transparent manner. H/she works closely with hiring managers to process forms, shortlist candidates, schedule interviews, and communicates with candidates and provides a high quality and professional human resources Recruitment service through the effective administration of HR recruitment system based on Recruitment policies and procedures for all WWF offices.

responsibilities.text: Supporting and participating in all recruitment Process (staff, intern, volunteer, secondment...) collecting applications, facilitating the candidate’s assessment (written Test and Interview), sending reference checks, negotiation, offering and employment contract.

evidence.quote: Supporting and participating in all recruitment Process (staff, intern, volunteer, secondment...) collecting applications, facilitating the candidate’s assessment (written Test and Interview), sending reference checks, negotiation, offering and employment contract.

responsibilities.text: Lead all recruitment processes in coordination with hiring managers

evidence.quote: Lead all recruitment processes in coordination with hiring managers

responsibilities.text: Preparing the induction frame works by coordination with all relevant departments to provide the full inductions to the new staff (local, expatriate, regional staff)

evidence.quote: Preparing the induction frame works by coordination with all relevant departments to provide the full inductions to the new staff (local, expatriate, regional staff)

responsibilities.text: Review JD format as WWF Standard, cross checking with Salary Grades and Position Classification Framework
